nasb.text: The men of Israel then turned back against the sons of Benjamin and struck them with the edge of the sword, both the entire city with the cattle and all that they found; they also set on fire all the cities which they found.

esv.text: And the men of Israel turned back against the people of Benjamin and struck them with the edge of the sword, the city, men and beasts and all that they found. And all the towns that they found they set on fire.

cnv.text: 以色列人又回到便雅憫人那裡，把全城的人和牲畜，以及一切遇見的，都用刀殺盡；又把他們碰見的一切城市放火燒毀了。

ccb.text: 以色列人回师便雅悯境内，将各城的男女老少以及牲畜全部杀死，又放火烧毁所有的城邑。
